_comment: Registry of stores the pipeline and the Calibration Studio know about. To ADD A STORE: (1) copy pipeline/config/_TEMPLATE to pipeline/config/<your_key> and edit its clips_manifest.json; (2) put that store's videos under footage_dir; (3) draw zones/tripwires (Studio or pipeline/calibrate.py); (4) add an entry below. All paths are relative to the repo root (store-intelligence/).
